name: @rivus/agent-presence
description: Sync local coding-agent presence to Feishu signature link previews.
author: PerfectPan <perfectpan325@gmail.com>

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/sources.default.json dist/src/sources.default.json && cp src/usage/litellm-pricing.json dist/src/usage/litellm-pricing.json && chmod +x dist/src/cli.js dist/scripts/*.js
scripts.install:all-hooks: pnpm run install:codex-hook && pnpm run install:claude-hook && pnpm run install:opencode-plugin && pnpm run install:gemini-hook && pnpm run install:pi-extension && pnpm run install:shutdown-watcher
scripts.uninstall:all-hooks: pnpm run uninstall:codex-hook && pnpm run uninstall:claude-hook && pnpm run uninstall:opencode-plugin && pnpm run uninstall:gemini-hook && pnpm run uninstall:pi-extension && pnpm run uninstall:shutdown-watcher
scripts.prepack: pnpm test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
